summary: Tested driver proximity notification feature for food store sellers. All backend and frontend components verified working. Fixed missing /api/notifications/unread endpoint. Added store coordinates for testing. 12/12 backend tests pass, frontend E2E tests pass.

minor.issue: Endpoint was missing - FIXED during testing by adding the endpoint
Store latitude/longitude were not set for test seller - FIXED by adding coordinates via DB update

backend: store_nearby_notification_sent flag prevents duplicate notifications - PASS
driver_arriving_store notification type created correctly - PASS
Haversine distance calculation for 500m threshold - PASS
frontend: FoodStoreDashboard.js - driver notification UI component - PASS

action_items: IMPORTANT: Add latitude/longitude fields to store settings page so sellers can set their location
Consider adding latitude/longitude to the allowed_fields in update_my_store endpoint (/app/backend/routes/food.py line 401)
critical_code_review_comments: The proximity notification system is well implemented with proper duplicate prevention
Store must have latitude/longitude set for the notification to work - currently not settable via UI
The notification polling runs every 10 seconds which is appropriate for this use case
Sound notification uses proper Audio API with error handling
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/notifications.py - Added /unread endpoint for fetching unread notifications
seed_data_creation: Added latitude=33.5138, longitude=36.2765 to store id dfad5020-75b9-401e-bbe4-a661155a5ccc for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver proximity notification for store sellers is working. The /api/notifications/unread endpoint was missing and has been added. Store coordinates were added via direct DB update. Note: Sellers cannot currently set store lat/lng via the UI - needs frontend/backend update.

issue_1.problem: /api/notifications/unread endpoint was missing, causing 404 errors in FoodStoreDashboard
issue_1.root_cause: The endpoint was never created in the notifications router

issue_2.problem: Store did not have latitude/longitude coordinates
issue_2.root_cause: The store creation/update flow doesn't include coordinate fields
issue_2.fix: Added coordinates directly via DB update. Recommend adding lat/lng to store settings UI.
